## Summary

## Type of change

- [ ] Content update (copy, SEO, images)
- [ ] Layout / structural change
- [ ] Dependency / tooling update
- [ ] New page or section

## Linked Issue

Closes #

## Control Plane Linkage

> Required for layout/structural changes and new features. Content-only updates may omit.

- Child Issue URL:
- Initiative ID: (e.g. `MVP-U5-PILOT-LAUNCH`)
- Readiness State: execution_ready

## Validation

- [ ] `hugo build` completes without errors or warnings
- [ ] Rendered output visually verified locally (`hugo serve`)
- [ ] No PHI or sensitive data introduced
- [ ] SEO frontmatter (`description`, `keywords`) updated if content changed
- [ ] MADR format followed if `docs/decisions/` modified
